title: Casual 3ish Mile Saturday Morning Run
description: Join us for a casual 3ish-mile run in the neighborhood. All paces are welcome as long as you can complete the distance. We meet at the bottom of the Windmuller Park stairs, at 54th Street and Woodside Avenue. We will wait 5-10 minutes to allow for late arrivals. Please be prompt! We often get coffee […]

title: Saturday AM Kids Art Club! / Clases de Arte para Niñxs!
description: Kids Art Club! Clases de Arte para Niñxs! – Lessons change Weekly Students learn about art theory, values, movements and how to find and use their own voice to create their version of the lesson. Led by artist instructors. This class is geared towards the process of learning & finding your creative voice. All young […]

title: Zumba with Veva
description: Start your Saturday off with an enjoyable and effective workout! (At office during inclement weather.)

title: Zumba Session
description: Zumba is a fusion of Latin, International and popular music dance themes creating a dynamic, exciting, effective fitness system! The routines feature aerobic fitness interval training with a combination of fast and slow rhythms that challenge both the heart and muscles. With fun music and easy-to-follow steps, you can’t go wrong! Instructor: Arlette Garofolin Location P.S. […]

title: Food Scrap Drop Off (FSDO)
description: Moore Jackson Community Garden’s Composting Committee collects food scraps throughout the year. During colder months, the bins you see here will be outside our fence by our double gate on 51st Street between 31/32 Aves. Please only drop off scraps on Saturdays between 9 a.m. and 12 noon.

title: Zumba Session
description: Zumba is a fusion of Latin, International and popular music dance themes creating a dynamic, exciting, effective fitness system! The routines feature aerobic, fitness interval training with a combination of fast and slow rhythms that tone and sculpt the body with easy to follow dance steps. Instructor: Marisol Castellanos Location Queens Community House Beacon @ PS […]

title: JHBG’s Tree LC
description: We need your help to keep our trees and gardens healthy and clean! Meet 10am in front of 3541 80th st! We will gather our tools and head out to the treebeds and gardens to water, clean and mulch. We work until noon. No experience necessary – we supply work gloves, tools and guidance. We […]

title: 34 Ave World Bike Ride
description: Travel the world without leaving Queens: Beginner to intermediate rides to points of interest in & around Jackson Heights. Rides are open to all. No bike? Are you 16 yo or over? No worries @Citibike has you covered. Download app before arrival. No helmet? Please DM us before the ride and we will bring one for you.

title: 34 Ave Gardening Club
description: Meet up at 34 Ave & 93 St to pick up gloves and tools and get a street assignment.

title: 9th Annual Beautification Day
description: You are invited to our 9th Annual Beautification Day on SATURDAY, May 16, 10:00 AM–1:00 PM at 31-57 51st Street | Woodside, QNS … Rain or Shine NEW Volunteers welcome. All ages welcome. Join us! Relax and Enjoy the Garden or Help Us Plant Something New! • Sidewalk Planting (non-edible plants) • Herbalism Activity • […]

title: Clases de Baile – Cumbia Sonidera
description: Cumbia Sonidera Lessons- all ages. Come ready to dance with our instructor extraordinaire @coolmarx . If it rains we will move inside school.

title: Shared Language: Community Writing as Care
description: A free, drop-in writing & reflection workshop for mothers and caregivers Hosted by Nadia Tahoun, artist and MSW candidate Join us for a supportive, participatory workshop where language becomes a space for care, connection, and reflection. Through carefully held prompts, mothers and caregivers are invited to anonymously contribute words and phrases that gather in a […]
